section_1.look_ahead_bias: NO — indicators computed on data up to current day only
section_1.same_candle_execution: Signal from day N close; stops/TPs checked on day N+1 high/low
section_1.mark_to_market: Cash balance only (conservative — open positions not marked)
section_1.multi_asset: Sequential single-asset runs sharing balance (not simultaneous)
section_1.CRITICAL: ALL data is synthetic. No fat tails, no correlation, no microstructure. Results are directional. Validate on real data before any production change.

section_2.explanation: The Conservative strategy at engine.py:254-264 INTENTIONALLY allows entries in CHOP (stop=2.5%, risk=0.25%) and LOWVOL (stop=2%, risk=0.25%). Only PANIC is blocked (line 223). The EMA200 filter (line 234) requires price > EMA200 but does NOT require TREND regime. This is by design, not a bug.
section_2.backtester_divergence: NONE — fast_backtest inlines the same logic from engine.py
section_2.regime_stability: Regime classified once per bar; no change between signal and execution

section_10.action: KEEP BASELINE — no modification passes all criteria on synthetic data
section_10.rationale: No tested modification showed positive OOS expectancy AND profit factor > 1 AND better challenge pass rate AND compatible max drawdown. Sample size may be insufficient, or the strategy needs fundamental redesign. CRITICAL: All tests ran on synthetic data — validate on real historical data.
next_steps: 1. Obtain real historical OHLCV for all 5 assets (min 2 years daily)
2. Re-run this study on real data
3. If still no passing experiment, consider fundamental strategy redesign
4. Do NOT modify production based on synthetic data alone
